description_long: This is a medium-sized, hard-shell suitcase with a smooth, slightly matte green exterior and subtle vertical ridges for added structure. The suitcase features a black zipper running along its perimeter, with reinforced black corner bumpers and four black swivel wheels at the base for easy maneuverability. A sturdy top handle and a recessed side handle are visible, both designed for comfortable carrying or lifting. The suitcase appears to have a molded plastic shell, likely made from polycarbonate or ABS, providing durability and impact resistance. There is a visible brand logo embossed on the side and a small metallic badge on the front. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for travel in urban environments.
description: A green hard-shell suitcase with black trim, four wheels, and both top and side handles. It features subtle ridges, a perimeter zipper, and visible brand markings.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the green shell, black zipper, top handle, and embossed side logo.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the top handle, black zipper, and a small metallic badge on the front.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back panel, top handle, and all four wheels.
description_view_3: Rear-left view showing the side handle, black zipper, and reinforced corner bumpers.
attribute_brand_logo: Embossed logo on the left side and a small metallic badge on the front.
